name: Bypass Reading Limitation
description: Bypass 'First Time Free' read limitation for all languages. Only affect 'Standard/Deluxe' plan titles, exclusive 'Deluxe' plan titles are server-driven.

name: Change package name
description: Appends ".morphe" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

name: Course Maps Fix
description: Fix course maps not rendered by using your own Google Maps API key.

options.title: Google Maps API Key
options.description:
The API key you created in Google Cloud Console. The Free key should be enough for normal daily use. DON'T SHARE YOUR OWN KEY!
In the Google Cloud Console: Create a project -> Enable Maps SDK for Android -> A billing account is required, you will be prompted to create one if none exists (You will not get charged as long the monthly $200 limit not passed, use wisely) -> Under Credentials, create an API key. The easiest way is to leave it unrestricted. If you do, fill in the patched app package name and SHA-1 signature. -> If the maps still blank, either the app signature is invalid; the project missing Maps SDK for Android or billing account.

name: Disable Ads
description: Disable banner, splash, and rewarded ads.

name: Disable Ads
description: Disable banner & splash ads.

name: Disable Ads
description: Disable banner ads.

name: Disable Analytics
description: Disables app tracker, Google & Firebase Analytics

name: Disable Anti-Tamper Detection
description: Disable Anti-Tamper detection that force quit the app.

name: Disable Pairip license check
description: Disables Play Integrity API (pairip) client-side license check. This patch does not bypass Play Integrity attestation or pairipcore virtualization.

name: Disable Region Lock
description: Bypass restricted region contents; access it anywhere, anytime.

name: Enable Certificate Pinning
description: Allow app network traffic to be inspected.

name: Enable Deluxe Plan
description: Enable Deluxe plan badge on settings. Bypass the 'First Time Free' read limitation only for English language on 'Standard/Deluxe' plan titles. Other languages aren't affected.

name: Enable Epic Family
description: Unlock access to all books, videos and audiobooks for lifetime.

name: Enable Premium
description: Unlock all premium benefits.

name: Enable Premium
description: Unlock premium features such as Unlimited access to PDF tools, Enable Cloud Storage; Split, Merge, Compress documents, and more. Google login or Google Drive storage is broken, need MicroG integration patch.

name: Enable Premium
description: Unlock all features in Pro.

name: Enable Premium
description: Disable trial time counter.

name: Enable Premium
description: Unlock unlimited use of ISO Burner, disable ads and disable coins system.

description: Unlock unlimited use of all tools, disable ads and disable coins system.

name: Enable Premium
description: Unlock unlimited use of Bootable USB drive creator, disable ads and disable coins system.

name: Enable Premium
description: Unlock premium features such as Advanced Color Tools, Clipping Masks & Alpha Masks, Manage layers with Groups, Import & customize brushes, and more...

name: Enable Pro

name: Enable PRO+

name: Enable Raw Capture
description: Force enable DNG raw capture option.

name: Fix Camera Mode Intent
description: Fix opening Camera FV-5 Lite when entering camera mode.

name: Fix Video Recording Intent
description: Fix opening Cinema FV-5 Lite from video recording menu.

name: Hide app icon
description: Hides the app icon from the Android launcher.

name: Higher Image Resolution
description: Unlock higher image resolutions that the device support.

name: Higher Video Resolution
description: Unlock higher resolutions that limited by the app.

name: Login Fix
description: Fix login issue by spoofing the installation source to Play Store.

name: Override certificate pinning
description: Overrides certificate pinning, allowing to inspect traffic via a proxy.

name: Spoof Install Source
description: Spoofs package installer checks to report the configured package name as the installation source. Default is Play Store.

options.title: Installer Package Name
